title: LowShields
description: A clean PvP-focused pack that reduces shield size for better screen visibility and smoother combat.
body:
---

![LowShield+ Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96490a70172e595b7aed66238a9148066e5c5851.png)

---

> Get a clearer view in combat without sacrificing protection.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🛡️ **Lowered First-Person Shield**  
  The shield is repositioned lower on the screen, keeping your center view clear during gameplay.

- ⚔️ **PvP Focused Visibility**  
  Track enemies, projectiles, and surroundings more easily—even while blocking.

- 🍃 **Vanilla-Friendly Look**  
  Maintains the default Minecraft style with no unnecessary changes or visual clutter.

- 🔗 **Wide Compatibility**  
  Works smoothly with Vanilla Minecraft, OptiFine, Iris, and Sodium.

- ⚡ **Lightweight & Efficient**  
  Simple JSON adjustment with zero impact on performance.

---

## 🌸 Why Choose LowShield+?

**LowShield+** is designed to solve one of the most common issues in Minecraft combat—the shield blocking too much of your screen.

Instead of shrinking or redesigning the shield, this pack simply adjusts its position to feel more natural and less intrusive. The result is a cleaner field of view while still keeping the full functionality of the shield intact.

It’s a small change that makes a noticeable difference, especially in PvP situations.

---

## 🛠 Installation Guide

1. Download the **LowShield+** `.zip` file  
2. Open Minecraft and go to **Options → Resource Packs**  
3. Click **Open Pack Folder** and move the `.zip` file inside  
4. Select **LowShield+** and enable it
